title: Jurrasic Park Theme Song
description: This texture pack replaces the blocks music disc with a custom Jurassic Park-themed disc and plays the iconic Jurassic Park theme song when used in a jukebox.
body:
This Minecraft texture pack replaces the "blocks" music disc with a custom-designed Jurassic Park-themed version. When inserted into a jukebox, it plays the iconic Jurassic Park theme song, bringing cinematic nostalgia into your world. The disc features a pixel-art vinyl design inspired by the classic Jurassic Park logo, complete with a red and yellow label, T-Rex silhouette, and musical accents. Whether you're exploring prehistoric builds or just want to relax with epic music, this pack transforms your in-game atmosphere with the unforgettable sounds of John Williams’ legendary score.

[Sound here](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lDlU08RU7Tk&t=1s&ab_channel=JohnWilliams-Topic)
